# runlet Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-04-10

## Active Technologies

- TypeScript 5.x (application code), JavaScript/TypeScript (user code execution) + Electron, Monaco Editor, React, Zustand, Babel, esbuild, Prettier, Vite (electron-vite) (001-runlet-desktop-app)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript 5.x (application code), JavaScript/TypeScript (user code execution): Follow standard conventions

- 001-runlet-desktop-app: Added TypeScript 5.x (application code), JavaScript/TypeScript (user code execution) + Electron, Monaco Editor, React, Zustand, Babel, esbuild, Prettier, Vite (electron-vite)
